heading: Special tax provisions
label: 1231 Special tax provisions
notes: CodificationFor repeal of section effective , and subsequent reenactment of section, see note set out preceding .Oct. 1, 1998section 1201 of this title

Amendments2005—Subsec. (a). , redesignated subsec. (c) as (a) and struck out former subsec. (a) which read as follows: “For the purpose of any State or local law imposing a tax on or measured by income, the taxable period of a debtor that is an individual shall terminate on the date of the order for relief under this chapter, unless the case was converted under .”Pub. L. 109–8, § 719(b)(4)section 706 of this titleSubsec. (b). , substituted “any governmental unit” for “a State or local governmental unit”.Pub. L. 109–8, § 1003(b), redesignated subsec. (d) as (b) and struck out former subsec. (b) which read as follows: “The trustee shall make a State or local tax return of income for the estate of an individual debtor in a case under this chapter for each taxable period after the order for relief under this chapter during which the case is pending.”Pub. L. 109–8, § 719(b)(4)Subsecs. (c), (d). , redesignated subsecs. (c) and (d) as (a) and (b), respectively.Pub. L. 109–8, § 719(b)(4)(B)

children.text: The issuance, transfer, or exchange of a security, or the making or delivery of an instrument of transfer under a plan confirmed under , may not be taxed under any law imposing a stamp tax or similar tax.section 1225 of this title
the date on which such governmental unit responds to the request under this subsection; or
